comment.label: month filter
comment.text: Add a true all-months directory mode. Treat month=all as all indexed months rather than the latest month: resolveMonthFilter should return effectiveMonth undefined and allMonths true for month=all, DirectoryPage should expose an All months option and preserve it through search/filter links, and /api/jobs?month=all should omit the thread month predicate while default requests still use the latest month.
